title: arctostaphylos lanata
intro: Arctostaphylos lanata, also known as woolly manzanita, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos lanata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Arctostaphylos lanata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
